seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael is presenting for evaluation of back pain that concerned his primary care provider, who ordered a CT scan
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael reports back pain usually located on the left side
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael's back pain is intermittently sharp and sometimes non-sharp
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael's back pain sometimes moves and sometimes stays in one place
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael denies increased tiredness recently
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael reports his appetite is unchanged
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael reports drinking a lot more water than usual
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael reports waking up at night to urinate more often than normal
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician notes that Michael has increased urine output
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael rides a bike occasionally for activity
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael reports that school is going well and he is getting good grades
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael reports that many people around him are sick these days
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael reports that most of his siblings are healthy
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael has a brother who smokes
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael's brother smokes in or around the house despite being told not to
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician notes there is a smoker at Michael's home and that this can affect Michael's health
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael has a history of recurrent strep throat with about four episodes in the last five months per chart
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael reports recurrent sore throats for which he is told he has strep throat
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam, Michael's throat shows no erythema or swelling and tonsils are midline
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam, Michael has no cervical lymphadenopathy
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician finds no physical signs of active strep infection on Michael's exam
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On lung exam, Michael has no wheezes, rales, or rhonchi
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On cardiac exam, Michael has normal heart sounds with no murmur, rub, or gallop
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael has no tenderness on palpation of the area of his left back pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael has no abdominal pain on palpation and no rebound or guarding
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael's CT scan shows findings concerning for glomerulonephritis
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician suspects Michael's recurrent strep episodes may have caused glomerulonephritis
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician is concerned that Michael's glomerulonephritis could lead to chronic kidney disease if not addressed
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to refer Michael to ENT for evaluation of glomerulonephritis-related problems and recurrent strep
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician wants ENT to consider tonsillectomy to help with Michael's recurrent strep
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order a lipid panel for Michael
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order a urinalysis for Michael
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order a comprehensive metabolic panel for Michael
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order a complete blood count for Michael
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order a vitamin D level for Michael
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order a TSH test for Michael
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician explains that the ordered labs will provide information about Michael's hormones, iron levels, nutrition, and body function
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician states that the tests will be paid for by Michael's mother
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician prefers Michael to get the blood tests done as soon as possible, starting today after the visit
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Some of Michael's planned blood tests will need to be done fasting
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael reports he may not be able to do the tests today because he has class and then work afterward
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael is changing jobs and his new job does not provide insurance
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael's new job is at a restaurant and may provide free food
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician counsels that Michael's salt intake will be very important if his infections and kidney issues are not controlled
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Michael asks if he needs to get a shot today and the clinician says no
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician
